Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello.[n]{f 1 5 0}Please excuse me for contacting you without notice.[n]{f 1 5 0}I don't mean to impose, but I wonder if I could trouble you to meet after school...?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be in front of the student council room. I hope it's not an inconvenience.[n]{f 1 5 0}Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Good afternoon. It's Fushimi.[n]{f 1 5 0}Forgive me for asking for help so suddenly, but do you have time to meet me after school?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be at the usual spot in the hallway, but it's not a problem if you can't make it.[n]{f 1 5 0}Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Good afternoon.[n]{f 1 5 0}I hope my messaging you on such short notice hasn't been an issue. I appreciate the time you've been able to spare.[n]{f 1 5 0}Would you be able to go somewhere with me after school? Anywhere is fine.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting in the hall again.[n]{f 1 5 0}Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 5 0}I wanted to ask this of you in person, but couldn't summon the courage this time...[n]{f 1 5 0}Could I borrow your attention after classes? There's something I'd like to talk to you about.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be in front of the student council room, as usual.[n]{f 1 5 0}Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Good afternoon, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 5 0}Your advice the other day was greatly appreciated. Although I don't have anything to give you in return, I hope to one day return the favor.[n]{f 1 5 0}I think I've finally gotten used to messaging you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Would you like to walk home together? {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 1}-san, hello.[n]{f 1 5 0}I hope this doesn't come at an inconvenient time for you.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm in need of a favor. Could you meet me at the usual spot?[n]{f 1 5 0}Sorry for always asking for your help... But I truly appreciate it.[n]{f 1 5 0}-Fushimi {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Good afternoon.[n]{f 1 5 0}Another sudden request. Sorry.[n]{f 1 5 0}Do you have time to help me study?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm thinking about that illustration collection and am having trouble concentrating. I feel like having you around would help me to focus.[n]{f 1 5 0}It'd be great to see you~[n]{f 1 5 0}-Fushimi {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 5 0}I don't mean to alarm you, but I'm feeling very on edge. That's not unusual for me, but it's gotten so bad lately that I'm having trouble eating.[n]{f 1 5 0}I keep worrying about what everyone is saying... But when I'm with you, that feeling goes away.[n]{f 1 5 0}I hope I'm not bothering you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hi~[n]{f 1 5 0}I should be used to messaging you by now, but I'm still nervous typing this. {f 1 3 138}[n]Would it be all right if I asked you to go out with me?[n]{f 1 5 0}I really want to see you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Between glares from classmates and whispers from strangers, I worry I won't be able to repair my reputation.[n]{f 1 5 0}No one seems to care about what the truth really is. I can't help but think this would go away if I left school outright.[n]{f 1 5 0}I need to think this through...[n]{f 1 5 0}Will you walk home with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 1}-san,[n]{f 1 5 0}Thank you so much for the other day. And please thank the president of the student council for me, too. {f 1 3 137}[n]When you have some time, there's something I'd like to discuss with you. Let me know when you're free~[n]{f 1 5 0}-Chihiro[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 5 0}Are you available to meet me today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hope I'm not disturbing your afternoon.[n]{f 1 5 0}Do you have time to meet?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm sorry to keep asking this way, but do you have some time to spare for me?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting to hear from you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello! It's Fushimi.[n]{f 1 5 0}Would you like to go somewhere together?[n]{f 1 5 0}Sorry for the short notice. If you have some time and are interested, please let me know before the end of the afternoon.[n]{f 1 5 0}Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello! It's Fushimi.[n]{f 1 5 0}It seems that summer vacation is coming to a close.[n]{f 1 5 0}I've acquired some tickets for a movie showing today. It's a bit of a tragedy, but it features some very charismatic acting performances...[n]{f 1 5 0}Would you like to go together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello.[n]{f 1 5 0}It's still so hot every day. {f 1 3 140}[n]Do you know about the festival tonight at Naganaki Shrine?[n]{f 1 5 0}If you were planning to go, I would love to go together. It would be nice to make some last summer memories with you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Please let me know what you think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The end of the year swept in so quickly.[n]{f 1 5 0}We've made very pleasant memories this year, and I was hoping to make one more before this chapter comes to a close.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm very grateful to have met you, {f 4 1}-san. Would you like to spend Christmas together...? {f 1 3 154}[n]{f 1 1}
